caption: The scene takes place in a formal assembly hall with tiered seating and green upholstered benches. A diverse group of people, primarily men in white button-down shirts or traditional Indian attire and women in colorful sarees, are seated and listening. Most of the attendees remain relatively still, maintaining attentive expressions. In the central rows, one man rests his chin on his hand in a pensive pose, while another man in a white shirt looks forward. The clothing varies from simple white shirts to formal gold and yellow sarees. Between the frames, there is very little movement; the people remain in their respective seats, and their posture and gaze stay largely consistent. No on-screen text, logos, or electronic equipment are visible in the shot, focusing entirely on the seated audience in the tiered environment.
